## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (format, lint, typecheck, 100% coverage, build)
- [ ] `npm run e2e` passes
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] No secrets or error output leaked; accessibility preserved
